summary: Backend pytest sweep (13/13 PASS) + Playwright sweep of the 10-feature batch (public surfaces, consent banner, anon vote, dashboard resume + cover-of-the-week strip, stuck books, account toggles, affinity rail, landing showcase). Two real bugs surfaced: /@username vanity redirect lands on / instead of /u/:username, and the anon vote flow shows NO transient sign-up toast (only the static page-bottom CTA). Reader fullscreen/tap-edge zones could NOT be verified because the seeded book has no backing EPUB file (spec said skip uploads).

minor.issue: Payload uses `reading_data_shared` not `opt_in`; works but worth flagging for FE call sites (current toggle component appears correct, but any external doc/curl example saying `opt_in` will 422).

ui_bugs.issue: Hard navigation to /@tester lands on the marketing landing `/` instead of redirecting to /u/tester. Same on encoded /%40tester. VanityRedirect.jsx is wired correctly in App.js, so this is likely a Kubernetes ingress / SPA fallback path-rewrite swallowing the `@`. Repro: open a fresh incognito tab and visit https://genre-sort.preview.emergentagent.com/@tester — observe landing page renders, URL is rewritten to /.

Clicking [data-testid=cover-vote-btn] increments the count from 0 → 1 and the sscv cookie is set (vote does persist on refresh), but NO transient toast/snackbar appears offering 'Sign up to save the vote'. Spec explicitly required this toast. Only the static bottom-of-page 'Sign up' CTA is shown.

integration_issues.issue: Every unauth page load fires several /api/auth/me requests that 401 (visible as 8-10 red console errors on /explore/covers, /cover/:id, /u/:username, /). Functional impact none, but noisy in DevTools and inflates analytics noise.

verification_passes.consent_banner_accept_decline_testids_an: PASS (decline persists `shelfsort-analytics-consent` in localStorage; banner gone on reload)
verification_passes.resume_reading_card_on_/library_with_see: PASS — text 'TEST Stuck HP Book · Tester · 42% in', href=/read/bk_tester_0
verification_passes.cover_of_the_week_strip_with_gold_ribbon: PASS — first card has Trophy ribbon + '#1 THIS WEEK' label; only first carries it; second carries 'TRENDING' pill (votes >= 3 and < 48h)
verification_passes.anon_vote_flow_increment_and_cookie_pers: PARTIAL — count increments, sscv cookie set, persists on reload, BUT no sign-up toast
verification_passes.stuck_books_page_/library/stuck: PASS — empty-state correctly shown (no books match window)
verification_passes.reading_privacy_toggle_persists_via_POST: PASS (verified at API layer; UI click not asserted)
verification_passes.reader_fullscreen_toggle_and_tap_edge_zo: INCONCLUSIVE — bk_tester_0 has no backing EPUB; Reader shows 'Couldn't open this book'. Could not verify fullscreen-toggle / reader-tap-prev / reader-tap-next without a real uploaded EPUB (spec said skip uploads).
verification_passes.affinity_rail_auto_hides_on_empty: PASS — [data-testid=affinity-rail] absent because tester has no community-cover matches
verification_passes.analytics_public_stats_endpoint: PASS (returns total_users, monthly_signups, total_covers as ints)
verification_passes.landing_community_showcase_and_landing_p: PASS once featured-eligible covers exist (showcase + data-testid=landing-public-counter both render; counter reads '246 readers · 3 AI covers shared · 241 signed up this month'). Showcase auto-hides on empty pool per CommunityShowcase.jsx:37 — confirmed documented behaviour, NOT a bug.

action_items: HIGH: Fix /@:username route — investigate whether the Kubernetes ingress is rewriting `@` out of the path or returning 404 to a non-SPA fallback. If ingress is fine, verify the React Router pattern works on hard-reload (try `/%40tester` SPA fallback). Without this, every shared `@username` link from RSS/og-share dies.
MEDIUM: Surface a transient toast (sonner / your toast system) after anon vote click that offers 'Sign up to save your vote across devices.' Spec called this out explicitly.
LOW: Suppress or silence the unauth /api/auth/me 401 noise on public pages — either gate the call on a presence-of-cookie check, or return a 200 with `{ user: null }` instead of 401.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/cover_public.py uses ISO-string comparisons for `shared_at` (`{$gte: cutoff}` against an isoformat string). This works ONLY because every writer also writes isoformat. Any future writer that stores BSON Date will silently disappear from the explore/featured rails. Consider standardising on BSON Date with `$gte: datetime` everywhere, or wrap writers in a single helper.

CommunityShowcase.jsx hides itself if `covers.length === 0`, which means the landing-public-counter ALSO hides when there are no featured covers — even though `stats.total_users` is non-zero. Probably acceptable, but if product wants the counter line to always show on landing once stats exist, lift the counter out of the conditional.

ResumeReadingCard.jsx filters in-progress by `0.01 < p < 0.99`. A book at exactly 0.99 or higher hides — fine for finished books, but a near-finished book (98.5%) won't show in resume, which may be confusing UX.
books.py:5982 — `shared_at >= trending_cutoff` uses string comparison; works for ISO 8601 UTC strings but fragile if any future writer omits the Z/offset.

success_rate.frontend: 9/11 verified passing, 1 inconclusive (Reader EPUB), 2 with bugs (vanity redirect + missing vote toast)

test_credentials: shelfsort-tester@example.com / tester123! (user_a18dde45958d, username `tester`, non-admin). Used as documented.
seed_data_creation: Seeded into MongoDB `test_database`: (1) 3 community_covers rows (cover_id TEST_cover_1781750581_0..2, all owned by tester, votes 8/9/10, fandom Harry Potter, shared_at as ISO string for the featured filter), with matching 1x1 PNG files under /app/community_covers/. (2) Upsert of books row bk_tester_0 for the tester (progress_fraction=0.42, last_opened_at=now, format=epub) so ResumeReadingCard renders. Note: bk_tester_0 has no backing EPUB on disk so Reader can't open it — fine for dashboard testing, blocks Reader UI verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter22_review_sweep.py is the canonical regression for this batch — runs in <2s, no external deps beyond the tester login. Seed cover IDs `TEST_cover_1781750581_{0,1,2}` are persisted in DB and have matching PNG files at /app/community_covers/. To re-run UI dashboard tests, set localStorage `shelfsort_tour_seen=1` first or the tour overlay will block. Reader tap-edge + fullscreen testids are unverified — you'd need to actually upload a small EPUB (or pre-populate /app/storage/<user_id>/bk_xxx with a real EPUB) to load the reader.

rca_of_the_issues.vanity_redirect: Symptom: GET /@tester returns marketing landing. Hypothesis A (most likely): the ingress / SPA fallback layer treats `@` in the path as a userinfo delimiter and rewrites to `/`. Hypothesis B: nginx/static server is returning a 404 instead of serving index.html for paths containing `@`, so React Router never sees the route. Repro from terminal: `curl -sI https://genre-sort.preview.emergentagent.com/@tester | head` — check if the response is index.html or a redirect. Fix: ensure SPA fallback rule covers all non-`/api/*` paths including `@`. If that's not possible, change the route shape (e.g., `/u/@username`) or have the backend explicitly 302 `/@:username` → `/u/:username` server-side.
rca_of_the_issues.missing_anon_vote_toast: PublicCoverDetail.jsx vote handler updates the count + cookie but does not call toast.success/toast.message. Spec requires a transient prompt. Fix: import { toast } from 'sonner' and on first successful vote-anon response (`signup_prompt: true`), `toast(<>Vote saved. <Link to=/auth/signup>Sign up</Link> to keep it across devices.</>)`.
